GREENBOT

Signed Android releases for operating GREENBOT robots with the Acmetec customer application.

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://acmetec.github.io/greenbot-fdroid/fdroid/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
7C A2 8C 9C 13 11 82 9C 0A 64 48 66 F9 18 09 AA BC A1 B2 53 53 9A B4 CD 7C 7A 84 73 1F 86 A2 28
